bindings.name: MULLU_BROWSER_SANDBOX_EVIDENCE
bindings.purpose: Path or reference to browser sandbox evidence required before browser live receipt production.

bindings.name: MULLU_VOICE_PROBE_AUDIO
bindings.purpose: Path or reference to an approved voice probe sample used for voice live receipt production.

bindings.name: MULLU_GATEWAY_URL
bindings.purpose: Public gateway URL candidate used for deployment publication and health witness checks.

bindings.name: MULLU_RUNTIME_WITNESS_SECRET
bindings.purpose: Governed runtime witness secret used to authorize deployment witness collection.

bindings.name: MULLU_RUNTIME_CONFORMANCE_SECRET
bindings.purpose: Governed conformance secret used to verify runtime deployment witness integrity.

bindings.name: MULLU_DEPLOYMENT_WITNESS_SECRET
bindings.purpose: Governed deployment witness secret used to verify production evidence plane collection before publication.

bindings.name: MULLU_AUTHORITY_OPERATOR_SECRET
bindings.purpose: Governed operator authority secret required for approval-bound promotion actions.
